description_long: This object consists of two medium-sized pumpkins with a classic round shape and slightly flattened bases, positioned closely together. Both pumpkins display a natural orange hue with subtle variations in tone, and their surfaces are marked by vertical ribbing typical of the species. Each pumpkin features a sturdy, slightly curved brown stem protruding from the top, with the stems showing some textural detail and color gradation. The pumpkins' surfaces appear matte with a semi-rough texture, and there are no visible carvings, etchings, or decorative accessories present. The pumpkins are uncarved and retain their natural, unaltered appearance. The setting and background are neutral, providing no clear indication of placement location.
description: Two natural, uncarved orange pumpkins with brown stems and ribbed surfaces, positioned side by side. Their surfaces are matte and semi-rough, with no decorative features.
description_view_0: Two pumpkins are closely aligned front-to-back, both showing their stems and ribbed orange surfaces, with the front pumpkin partially obscuring the rear one.
description_view_1: Both pumpkins are fully visible side by side, clearly showing their round shapes, vertical ribbing, and brown stems.
description_view_2: The pumpkins are aligned back-to-front, with the rear pumpkin's stem and upper surface visible above the front pumpkin.
description_view_3: Both pumpkins are side by side, facing forward, with their stems upright and ribbed surfaces clearly visible.
